backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a service management system with CRUD operations for fitness services and static business info for Bodyshape Fitness, including blob storage mixin integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of a 'Meet the Manager' section on the homepage with Allen A.'s photo and biography.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the React application structure, components, pages, and styling for Bodyshape Fitness website.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system using true red accent colors and custom CSS variables for light/dark mode theming.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags and title for Bodyshape Fitness personal training business in Dallas, TX.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for Home and Locations pages wrapped in Layout component.
Audio player component with play/pause, mute, and volume controls that persists user preferences to localStorage and plays royalty-free workout music.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Interactive gallery component displaying 12 gym facility photos in a responsive grid with hover effects and modal dialog for enlarged image viewing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header, Bodyshape Fitness branding, responsive navigation with mobile menu, BackgroundMusic integration, and footer with contact details and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LocationCard.tsx: React component that displays a gym location's details (name, address, phone, hours) in a card layout with icons from lucide-react.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: React component that renders a grid of customer reviews with star ratings, displaying testimonials from the reviews data file.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: TypeScript data file containing an array of six customer reviews with reviewer names, ratings, review text, and dates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for React Query hooks that would interact with the backend; currently exports nothing as no backend queries are needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light/dark theme colors, importing Inter and Bebas Neue fonts, and setting up a red-accented fitness brand theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring a hero section with 20th anniversary badge, gym description with owner photo, feature cards, image gallery, and testimonials section.
frontend/src/pages/Locations.tsx: Locations page component displaying gym location details, embedded Google Maps, and contact information with phone, email, and address.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Inter, Bebas Neue), border radius variables, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file for a Bodyshape Fitness gym website tracking architectural notes, known issues (incorrect business info, wrong location, placeholder content, pink instead of red colors), and existing features including homepage, image gallery, locations page, and design implementation.
